summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Daily Focus Stack app. All core features working correctly including onboarding, task management (3 task limit enforced), task completion with strikethrough animation, 3/3 celebration overlay, history with calendar and streak counter, settings with time picker/theme toggle/app icon selection, and tab navigation. No critical issues found.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - appears when celebration overlay renders

action_items: Fix deprecation warning: Replace 'pointerEvents' prop with 'style.pointerEvents' in celebration overlay (app/(tabs)/index.tsx line 287)
Consider adding testID to celebration overlay for easier testing
critical_code_review_comments: All testIDs properly implemented for interactive elements
React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, TextInput)
All text wrapped in Text component
AsyncStorage used correctly for local data persistence
Theme system implemented well with proper color switching
3 task limit enforced in code (line 173 in index.tsx)
Proper error handling in storage functions
Code follows React Native best practices
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - app uses AsyncStorage which starts empty on first load
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. AsyncStorage persists data in browser session but resets on page reload in web preview. Mobile app would have persistent storage. The deprecation warning is minor and doesn't affect functionality.
